case_title: HENRY YEUNG VS. CAITLIN ELIZABETH GORDON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,843.08 FILED BY YEUNG, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, CAITLIN ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT GORDON, CAITLIN ELIZABETH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF HENRY YEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAITLIN ELIZABETH GORDON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARA SANDBERG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-12-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HENRY YEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAITLIN ELIZABETH GORDON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY YEUNG, HENRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEUNG, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, CAITLIN ELIZABETH $4,843.08 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,893.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
